name: Rasberry Coil Coffeecake
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------GLAZE-----------------------------------
1 cup powdered sugar
1 teaspoon butter or margarine (softened)
2 tablespoons milk, hot
Preheat oven to 375°F. Divide the dough into 6 pieces. On a lightly floured surface, roll each piece to an 18-inch rope. Beginning at the center of a greased large baking sheet, make a loose swirl with the first rope. Add a second rope, overlapping about 1 inch of the first one; coil the second rope around the first rope. Continue adding the remaining ropes in the same manner. Spread preserves evenly over the dough. Cover loosely with wax paper; let rise in a warm place until doubled, about 30 minutes. Bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes until golden brown. Remove from baking sheet and drizzle glaze on warm coffee cake. Serve warm.
